title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: seehiong/multi-model-chat
summary: Multi-Model Chat — Compare responses from multiple AI models side by side in real-time. Supports GPT, Claude, Mistral, and local models (Ollama). Built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

title: Tpain166/claude-dashboard
summary: 🛠 Manage Claude Code sessions with a TUI featuring real-time monitoring, conversation history, and automatic session detection.

title: estrify/ProjectLodestar
summary: 🌟 Optimize AI development with Lodestar by smartly routing between free local and premium LLM models to cut costs by over 90%.

title: satchmakua/llm-eval-harness
summary: Provider-agnostic LLM eval harness: task suites, deterministic + LLM-as-judge graders, regression gating in CI, and per-model cost & latency tracking. Local-first via Ollama; OpenAI and Anthropic supported.

title: bhxtnx/SelfAgent
summary: 🤖 Build a self-hosted AI assistant to manage files, browse web, write code, and chat via a WhatsApp-style interface using your own API keys.

title: lugga1s/oxideLLM
summary: High-performance Rust LLM gateway with async telemetry off the critical path. Zero-copy streaming proxy for Ollama/vLLM.

title: gary23w/nl-veil
summary: A swarm of autonomous AI minds, unified and steered by a single consciousness - the Veil. Runs on any language model.

title: blackroserog/Openclaw-Setup
summary: 🤖 Install and configure OpenClaw, a local AI assistant connecting to messaging apps for autonomous tasks and context-aware help.

title: guttbuster/Ollqd
summary: 📚 Index codebases and docs into Qdrant with Ollama embeddings, enabling AI assistants to search code via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

title: dragoshont/apprenticeops
summary: Open, reproducible benchmark for small, quantized, fully-offline local LLMs as homelab ops assistants — profiling quality × safety × energy together and reducing model choice to a measured Pareto front. arXiv preprint → NeurIPS D&B track. Human-guided, AI-assisted.

title: gyorgysh/myhq
summary: Self-hosted fleet of autonomous Claude Code agents you command from Telegram. Hierarchy, memory, skills, scheduling, and a web panel.

title: 3ilix/MemBrain
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI interactions with MemBrain, a solution for long-term memory and context management in agentic AI systems, offering personalized experiences.

title: GBran88/AI-Assistant-Excel
summary: 🤖 Enhance your Excel experience with an AI assistant that automates tasks and integrates cloud and local models for smarter data management.

title: earlvanze/sage-router
summary: Local-first AI model router for serious agents. One endpoint for OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Ollama, NVIDIA NIM, and authorized provider fallback.

title: kaletek/AI-Fashion-Recommendation-System
summary: 👗 Deliver personalized outfit suggestions using AI, enhancing your wardrobe choices with tailored fashion recommendations.

title: ErikMischiatti/M.I.R.A
summary: Embodied AI assistant prototype with PySide6, expressive face UI, modular cognition, local actions, memory, and optional Ollama LLM integration.

title: cozuXI/opencode_webui_cli
summary: 💻 Build and manage projects efficiently with the OpenCode Web UI CLI, featuring a chat interface, file previews, and model selection.

title: gentry-king/agent-infrastructure-stack
summary: 🤖 Build and manage a production-grade agent infrastructure stack using TypeScript, Node.js, and Terraform for seamless deployment and robust performance.

title: Abdulel3h/ChatUB
summary: Local Arabic AI academic assistant using semantic search, university FAQ data, Flask, and Ollama.
